final:
module Shift_register_8(
   input                clk,
   input                rst_n,
   input                load,
   input  [7:0]         D,
   
   output reg [7:0]     Q
);
    always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)begin
        if(!rst_n) Q <= 8'd0;
        else if(load) Q <= D;
        else Q <= Q << 1;
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Q <= ~Q; // Invert the register value
    end
  end

endmodule
